title: First-play onboarding remediation
summary: Update first-play guidance so the player sees what can be selected, how to move the camera, and which first action chain is available in both supported locales.
acceptance: Default first-play guidance explains selection, camera movement and the minimum playable command without exposing diagnostics
Guidance is localized in zh-CN and en and can be dismissed/reopened or remains reachable through a player surface
Copy stays within current controlled-test/demo boundaries and does not make public release or final balance claims
The guidance points to visible read-model state, not hidden omniscient lore or prose-only events
Tests or report evidence show onboarding in both locales after the command chain lands

history.details: Updated en/zh-CN first-play selection, camera, and lamp-priority command guidance on the start surface and persistent player HUD; focused UI tests and quality pass; pnpm web-shell filter remains unsupported.
verified: No blocking findings; first-play guidance acceptance evidence confirmed
Merged acdf3cd into main; validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, and pnpm quality passed on main

forbiddenPaths: public release, store, EA or final legal/privacy claims

review.summary: No blocking findings; first-play guidance acceptance evidence confirmed

integration.summary: Merged acdf3cd into main; validate-handoff, taskctl validate/status, git diff --check, and pnpm quality passed on main
